sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀξίνη

- Transliteration: Axine

- Phonetic: ax-ee'-nay

- Definition:

1. an axe

- Origin: probably from agnumi (to break, cf G4486)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Probably from ἄγνυμι agnumi (to break; compare G4486); an axe: - axe.
